description: Object key ordering where UTF-16 code unit sort (the PIC-CJSON/1.0 rule) and Unicode code point sort (a naive host-language fallback) diverge: U+10400 (supplementary plane; UTF-16 surrogate pair D801+DC00) MUST sort before U+F900 (BMP; UTF-16 code unit F900). Catches implementations that use host-language default string ordering (e.g., Python 3 default str comparison, which sorts by code point).
source: hand-verified against docs/canonicalization.md §7.2, §7.6, §7.7, §7.8, §7.9 and RFC 8785 §3.2.3 by Fabio M. S., 2026-04-20
